intro: This week on InstantViral Learn: Social Media Metrics That Matter. Prioritize metrics tied to your goal: reach diagnostics, engagement quality, and conversion proxies. Vanity counts without context create false confidence — cite sources when quoting benchmarks.
mainSummary: Prioritize metrics tied to your goal: reach diagnostics, engagement quality, and conversion proxies. Vanity counts without context create false confidence — cite sources when quoting benchmarks.
keyTakeaways: Context matters more than a single number
